title: Renovate sports turf
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Renovate sports turf demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to renovate turf

pcs.text: Assess the turf renovation site and determine extent of works according to renovation program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the turf renovation site and determine extent of works according to renovation program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the turf renovation site and determine extent of works according to renovation program.

pcs.text: Identify turf grass species, materials and resources and calculate quantities required for renovation program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify turf grass species, materials and resources and calculate quantities required for renovation program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify turf grass species, materials and resources and calculate quantities required for renovation program.

pcs.text: Collect soil samples and conduct or arrange tests to establish physical and chemical condition of the soil according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect soil samples and conduct or arrange tests to establish physical and chemical condition of the soil according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect soil samples and conduct or arrange tests to establish physical and chemical condition of the soil according to industry standards.

pcs.text: Identify, select and check hand tools, equipment and materials required for renovation work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select and check hand tools, equipment and materials required for renovation work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select and check hand tools, equipment and materials required for renovation work.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess their risks and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess their risks and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess their risks and implement controls.

pcs.text: Prepare a schedule of works according to site assessment and soil conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a schedule of works according to site assessment and soil conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a schedule of works according to site assessment and soil conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to renovate turf

elements.title: Prepare renovation equipment

pcs.text: Select, check, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery and rectify, report or tag faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery and rectify, report or tag faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery and rectify, report or tag faults.

pcs.text: Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery for turf renovation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery for turf renovation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery for turf renovation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare renovation equipment

elements.title: Implement sports turf renovation

pcs.text: Operate turf renovation tools, equipment and machinery safely and effectively to renovate turf surface
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate turf renovation tools, equipment and machinery safely and effectively to renovate turf surface?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate turf renovation tools, equipment and machinery safely and effectively to renovate turf surface.

pcs.text: Assess and review renovation activities against scheduled works and undertake remedial action where out-of-specification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and review renovation activities against scheduled works and undertake remedial action where out-of-specification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and review renovation activities against scheduled works and undertake remedial action where out-of-specification.

pcs.text: Maintain a clean and safe work area throughout and on completion of work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain a clean and safe work area throughout and on completion of work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a clean and safe work area throughout and on completion of work.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement sports turf renovation

elements.title: Complete renovation activities

pcs.text: Collect and dispose of waste material according to workplace and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and dispose of waste material according to workplace and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and dispose of waste material according to workplace and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Record and report work outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report work outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report work outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete renovation activities
